description: A stranger bumps into me hard and spills beer all over my clothes. When I ask for an apology, he laughs and shoves me again. My anger rises rapidly and I grab the bottle.
options: Walk away and try to calm down
Smash his head with the glass bottle
Yell at him and call security

punishment_impressions.0: No legal consequences. Walking away is always the safest option.
punishment_impressions.1: Might get some mocking or social embarrassment, but no legal risk.
punishment_impressions.2: Shouting and threatening may lead to removal by staff or a minor citation.
punishment_impressions.3: Physically attacking someone can result in assault charges, fines, or short jail time.
punishment_impressions.4: A serious injury from the punch could lead to aggravated assault charges, with potential for 1–3 years in prison and a criminal record.
punishment_impressions.5: If the punch causes lasting damage (e.g., broken bones, unconsciousness), the consequences could include 5+ years in prison, civil lawsuits, and a permanent violent crime record.
